title: The Enemy Tries to Regain Control
description: On pages 7–10, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7. The central beat is the enemy tries to regain control.
scene: The scene focuses on the enemy tries to regain control, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 shaping the Punk Hazard finale and the road toward Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Big bro with the fluffy head...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Mochya hasn't opened her eyes yet

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Mochya fought for us, didn't she?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: She's gonna help us get home, right!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: I guess you're right.... but besides that...

summary: The Enemy Tries to Regain Control. This part advances the collapse of Caesar’s operation, Law’s leverage over Doflamingo, and the alliance’s next destination.
